2026-04-24T02:02:41.0935760Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-24T02:02:41.0936716Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-24T02:02:41.0937138Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-24T02:02:41.0937502Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-24T02:02:41.0937820Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-24T02:02:41.0938060Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-24T02:02:41.0938226Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-24T02:02:41.0938414Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-24T02:02:41.0938585Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-24T02:02:41.0938834Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-24T02:02:41.0939042Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-24T02:02:41.0939329Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-24T02:02:41.0939588Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-04-24T02:02:41.0939796Z [36;1m[0m
